title: Skill
description: Spec 371 — the v2 layered, type-classified skill. `type` is the R15 classification (orthogonal to `kind`, the walk-shape); `owner` records the author (A6); each field is tagged in the committed skill.yaml with a `source` (derived|authored|sampled, A4/A5). Validation is LAYERED: when `type` is declared, a small required CORE per type applies (description for all; technique→phases, pattern/pillar→overview, reference→references, discipline→common_mistakes); legacy skills with no `type` keep the name+kind floor. The authoritative validator is agency/_skill_parse.py::parse_skill; this schema is the published contract.

owner.description: who authored the skill — the auto-generator or the capability itself (A6)

description.description: 'use when…' — third person, search keywords, NEVER a workflow summary (R1)

common_mistakes.description: the rationalization table — symptom + counter (R13, discipline core)

source_stamp.description: source-hash for the staleness gate — install never auto-rewrites (A7)
